name: Kunimitsu Tezuka
description: A third-year who is currently the captain of the Seigaku tennis team. He is known to be a National-level player and has been noted by many characters in the series to be one of the toughest opponents in their era.

name: Mao
description: __Classification:__ Demon Lord A new teacher who teaches at the adventurer school where [Yuusha](https://anilist.co/character/128643/Yuulia-Chardiet) and her friends attend. Although mentally mature, because of her young appearance, she is treated like a cute mascot by the students. her true identity is that of the fearsome demon lord.

name: Mei Kamino
description: An eccentric graduate student who studies nonexistent creatures. She has a cheery and confident personality. Although she is a genius, she has an air of absentmindedness, often losing things. After receiving a request to fill in for an absent professor in the investigation of Misakioku, she became wrapped up in the fight against Godzilla.

name: Midnight
description: Midnight is a mage which belongs to the Oración Seis guild, a dark guild composed of highly powerful mages whose goal is to find a power known as Nirvana, a very destructive power that was sealed away long ago. Not much is know about Midnight currently that not even the Blue Pegasus Guild, who were monitoring the Oración Seis, have much information about him outside his name. He thinks of Brain as his own father, but they are not related.

name: Mikoto Kiba
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Arashi's senior. Is and excellent motorcyclist and is known as the "rich girl" at school.

nativeName: ナージャ・アップルフィールド
description: Nadja Applefield is a sunny, charming girl, with a talent for dancing and making friends wherever she goes. Even though she is very young, she shoulders responsibility quite well, often taking care of the children younger than her at the orphanage. On the other hand she is impulsive to the point of foolhardiness and extremely trusting, which leads others to take easy advantage of her and even abuse her thoroughly, if the right buttons are pressed. searchTerms: ナージャ・アップルフィールド

name: Ning Chan Xia
description: __Race:__ Human __Body Type:__ Medicine Holy Body Xia Ning Chang was also a disciple of High Heaven Pavilion when Yang Kai was still a trial-disciple. After seeing Yang Kai's determination on the path to enlightenment in the Martial Dao, she would develop feelings for him. She would later on become the second wife to Yang Kai and accompany him on his travels. name: Olivier Vandeberme
nativeName: オリビエ・ファンデベルメ
description: Olivier is the director of the Reconstruction Agency. She has a sadistic relationship with Juuzou, often taunting him about their "promise". Olivier is very dedicated to her work and prideful, hating when she isn't able to voice her opinions or if her superiority is undermined. However, she has good intentions and works for the common good but the corrupt government stands in her way.

name: Popee
description: The star of the show, Popee, is a clown in an odd red-striped jumpsuit and bunny ears. He is adept at juggling, being a clown, pulling large knives and small bombs out of thin air. He is not adept at ever succeeding in his nefarious plans to hurt his poor assistant or the owner of the circus.

name: Reiji Tokisaka
description: __Height:__ 178 cm __Occupation:__ Private investigator Reiji has been all throughout Japan's history, from fighting during the second world war, to becoming a part of the Japanese police department. After a certain case and the lost of his wife, Reiji could no longer hack being in the police force and began to be a freelance Detective. name: Richard Sanchez
description: He is a genius scientist whose alcoholism and reckless, nihilistic behavior are a source of concern for his daughter's family, as well as the safety of their son, Morty.

name: Riku Tamanaha
description: Riku Tamanaha is a kind and cheerful girl who is also very shy and has a fear of interpersonal relationships. She is a kogyaru, a type of gyaru who is known for her fashionable style and outgoing personality. However, Tamanaha's shyness often prevents her from expressing herself fully, and she often overthinks situations and makes herself anxious. name: Rindou
description: __Height:__ 147cm (4'9") Rindou is a transfer student from the Aoi Clan, who later joins the Dog Squad as their fourth member. She is shy and usually hides her face with a fox mask.

name: Samus Aran
description: Samus is a bounty hunter. She was orphaned by space pirates and raised by the Chozo on planet Zebes. To survive on the planet the Chozo infused their DNA into her and later gave her a power suit to become a protector of the galaxy.
